dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3385 PCS: Lower Health Care Costs Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Schumer introduced the following bill; which was read the first time
Read the second time and placed on the calendar

form.official-title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to extend the enhancement of the health care premium tax credit.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Lower Health Care Costs Act.

section.header: Extension of enhancement of health care premium tax credit

subsection.header: Extension of rules to increase premium assistance amounts
subsection.text: Clause (iii) of section 36B(b)(3)(A) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended—

paragraph.text: in the heading, by striking through 2025 and inserting through 2028, and
in the matter preceding subclause (I), by striking before January 1, 2026 and inserting before January 1, 2029.

subsection.header: Extension of rule to allow credit to taxpayers whose household income exceeds 400 percent of poverty line
subsection.text: Subparagraph (E) of section 36B(c)(1) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended—

paragraph.text: in the heading, by striking through 2025 and inserting through 2028, and
by striking before January 1, 2026 and inserting before January 1, 2029.

subsection.text: The amendments made by this section shall apply to taxable years beginning after December 31, 2025.

endorsement.action-desc: Read the second time and placed on the calendar
